item.title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
item.description:
н•ӯлӘ© к°’
к°ҖкІ© ГӮВЈ54.23
нҸүм җ Five
мһ¬кі  In stock
м№ҙн…Ңкі лҰ¬ History

мҶҢк°ң

From a renowned historian comes a groundbreaking narrative of humanityГўВҖВҷs creation and evolutionГўВҖВ”a #1 international bestsellerГўВҖВ”that explores the ways in which biology and history have defined us and enhanced our understanding of what it means to be ГўВҖВңhuman.ГўВҖВқOne hundred thousand years ago, at least six different species of humans inhabited Earth. Yet today there is only oneГўВҖВ”h From a renowned historian comes a groundbreaking narrative of humanityГўВҖВҷs creation and evolutionГўВҖВ”a #1 international bestsellerГўВҖВ”that explores the ways in which biology and history have defined us and enhanced our understanding of what it means to be ГўВҖВңhuman.ГўВҖВқOne hundred thousand years ago, at least six different species of humans inhabited Earth. Yet today there is only oneГўВҖВ”homo sapiens. What happened to the others? And what may happen to us?Most books about the history of humanity pursue either a historical or a biological approach, but Dr. Yuval Noah Harari breaks the mold with this highly original book that begins about 70,000 years ago with the appearance of modern cognition. From examining the role evolving humans have played in the global ecosystem to charting the rise of empires, Sapiens integrates history and science to reconsider accepted narratives, connect past developments with contemporary concerns, and examine specific events within the context of larger ideas.Dr. Harari also compels us to look ahead, because over the last few decades humans have begun to bend laws of natural selection that have governed life for the past four billion years. We are acquiring the ability to design not only the world around us, but also ourselves. Where is this leading us, and what do we want to become?Featuring 27 photographs, 6 maps, and 25 illustrations/diagrams, this provocative and insightful work is sure to spark debate and is essential reading for aficionados of Jared Diamond, James Gleick, Matt Ridley, Robert Wright, and Sharon Moalem. …more

item.title: Sharp Objects
item.description:
н•ӯлӘ© к°’
к°ҖкІ© ГӮВЈ47.82
нҸүм җ Four
мһ¬кі  In stock
м№ҙн…Ңкі лҰ¬ Mystery

мҶҢк°ң

WICKED above her hipbone, GIRL across her heart Words are like a road map to reporter Camille PreakerГўВҖВҷs troubled past. Fresh from a brief stay at a psych hospital, CamilleГўВҖВҷs first assignment from the second-rate daily paper where she works brings her reluctantly back to her hometown to cover the murders of two preteen girls. NASTY on her kneecap, BABYDOLL on her leg Since WICKED above her hipbone, GIRL across her heart Words are like a road map to reporter Camille PreakerГўВҖВҷs troubled past. Fresh from a brief stay at a psych hospital, CamilleГўВҖВҷs first assignment from the second-rate daily paper where she works brings her reluctantly back to her hometown to cover the murders of two preteen girls. NASTY on her kneecap, BABYDOLL on her leg Since she left town eight years ago, Camille has hardly spoken to her neurotic, hypochondriac mother or to the half-sister she barely knows: a beautiful thirteen-year-old with an eerie grip on the town. Now, installed again in her familyГўВҖВҷs Victorian mansion, Camille is haunted by the childhood tragedy she has spent her whole life trying to cut from her memory. HARMFUL on her wrist, WHORE on her ankle As Camille works to uncover the truth about these violent crimes, she finds herself identifying with the young victimsГўВҖВ”a bit too strongly. Clues keep leading to dead ends, forcing Camille to unravel the psychological puzzle of her own past to get at the story. Dogged by her own demons, Camille will have to confront what happened to her years before if she wants to survive this homecoming.With its taut, crafted writing, Sharp Objects is addictive, haunting, and unforgettable. …more
